publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-09-15 18:33:45 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes lists of members; organizational charts; material on the Council's functions and regulations; manuals; minutes of meetings; reports; and tape recordings of meetings and talks at Cornell University.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes lists of members; organizational charts; material on the Council's functions and regulations; manuals; minutes of meetings; reports; and tape recordings of meetings and talks at Cornell University, including talks by Carl Sagan, Barber B. Conable, Donald G. Dickason, Richard M. Ramin, Deane W. Malott, Dale Corson, Morris Bishop, A. Henry Detweiler concerning the Sardis Expedition, and recordings of joint Council-Trustee meetings. Also program and pin for the Trustee-Council Annual Meeting, 2008. Also information pertaining to special events on campus such as dedications that would have been attended by members of the Council, invitation and participant lists for events are also included.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Includes collection 8-2-1359, which are Public Information Office records regarding the Council transferred to this collection. See collection #4-3-15 for other records of the Public Information Office.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Council records, #41-3-1020. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to tapes of Council meetings restricted to permission of the University Archivist

did.unittitle: Manual for Members of the Cornell University Council

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contain documents such as 1951 Autumn Meeting Questionnaire, Functions of the Council, Regulations of the Council, etc.
Folder 1 contains more detailed documents than Folder 2. Also, Folder 2 has a copy of "A Handbook on Bequests and Life Income Agreements".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also contains an attendance list of the council meeting 1954, a list of invitations to non-council members, a list of local attendants of the council meeting, and one other document.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The two folders contain separate copies.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council Constitution August 1956 Revisions
Cornell University Council Constitution April 1959 Revisions
Cornell University Council Constitution February 1961 Revisions
Cornell University Council Reports to Administrative Board Deans, Faculty, Staff, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains "Cornell Facts" publication from the year 1957-1958, and "Facts About Cornell" publications from years 1958-1959, 1959-1960, and 1960-1961. Also, contains correspondences related to the publications, and other relevant documents.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains miscellaneous documents such as reports to the administrative board by various departments/colleges, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains miscellaneous documents about the various meetings, such as programs, invitations, reports, and relevant publications.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains documents like member lists, attendance sheets, etc.

scopecontent.p: Contains documents such as letters to the committee members, election-related documents like suggested-members lists, etc.

scopecontent.p: Contains the conference program, reports, newspaper clippings, etc. Also contains the negatives of Martin E Janis with Mayor Richard J. Daley on 2/14/1963, and with Cornell groups on 2/16/1963.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - Annual Meetings Member Lists

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a notebook, with handwritten members lists for 3rd-6th annual Council meetings.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 1st Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, members, invitees, and attendees lists, propositions, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 2nd Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, members and attendees lists, newspaper clippings, publications, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 3rd Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, meeting program, attendees lists, transcriptions, Council roster 1953-1954, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 4rth Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, members and attendees lists, newspaper clippings, publications, meeting program, photos, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 5th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, writings, a copy of Cornell Alumni News Volume 58, No. 5, members lists, newspaper clippings, meeting program, photos, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 6th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains addresses, meeting program, some publications, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 6th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, a report, members and attendees lists, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - Chairman John P. Syme Annual Report
Cornell University Council - 7th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains addresses, correspondences, meeting program, members and attendees lists, newspaper clippings, photos, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 7th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains the meeting program, and detailed documents related to J.L. Zwingle's slide presentation.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 8th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains speeches, correspondences, meeting program, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 1st Regional Meeting , NYC - Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a summary of the speech by Dean Paul M. O'Leary, correspondences, attendees list, a publication from Cornell Alumni News, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - Chairman Edwin T. Gibson's Annual Report

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains documents related to annual meetings, correspondences, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 9th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains samples of materials used in a display of state college publications in Statler Inn.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 9th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains sample of registration kits, a member roster and another document.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 9th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a report, addresses, meeting program, correspondences, and other documents

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 10th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contain a report, attendees list, meeting program, correspondences, a copy of Cornell Daily Sun, Vol. LXXVII, No. 15, and Cornell Crescent, Vol. 25, and other documents.
The two folders contain many of the same documents and publications.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 12th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a report, the meeting program, correspondences, a copy ILR Research, Volume 8, No. 1; Ithaca Journal, 147th Year, No. 235; of a special edition of Cornell Daily Sun, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 12th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a report, correspondences, welcoming remarks of Harold Brayman, the Council Chairman, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 12th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains the master list, and some other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 15th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, members roster, members geographic summary, council's constitution, and other documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - 16th Annual Meeting Documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondences, attendees roster, invitees list, housing-related and other documents.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains meetings' minutes, agendas, notifications, correspondences, and other related documents.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains meetings' minutes, agendas, notifications, correspondences, and other related documents.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains miscellaneous correspondences and related documents.

did.unittitle: Cornell University Council - Membership Letters, etc.
8-2-1359, Public Information Office records regarding the Council

General List for EEC (European Economic Community, Common Market) Conference
Thanking Arthur H. Dean for Conference
Council - Supplies, incl. Mimeo, Printed Materials
Trustee Dinner - Clark Hall - John Marcham
Cornell University Council - Annual Meetings, 1951 - 1967. Bound folders containing invitations, reservation forms, attendance lists, program of events, menus, and a game program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains Space Sciences Building Dedication, Harvard-Cornell game program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence, an article on the Council, and the Pennsylvania-Cornell game program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains "A Tour of Clark Hall of Science," "Cornell Latin American Year" booklet, Princeton-Cornell game program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains Malott Hall booklet, Centennial booklets and article, Pennsylvania-Cornell game program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains James Alfred Perkins Inauguration Luncheon and Address program, article on Perkins's installation, article on marijuana on campus

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains "The Role of the University in Promoting Change," Cornell Daily Sun Centennial Edition, Harvard-Cornell Game Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains "The Growth of Knowledge: The New Threat to Education?," Nuclear reactor article, Navy-Cornell Game Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cornell University Announcements: College of Architecture, City and Regional Planning Pamphlet, misc. articles, Cornell-Harvard Game Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "The Educational Pace is Getting Faster" Speech transcript, "Hollister Hall - College of Engineering" Pamphlet, Cornell Alumni News, photographs, Yale-Cornell Game Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "The Story of Cornell University" pamphlet, misc. articles, "Letter from Cornell," photographs, Alumni Newsletter

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Greatest Schools in Nation" Chicago Tribute Survey, Syracuse-Cornell Game Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Council reporter, "For Ezra Cornell - A 150th Birthday Anniversary Dinner,"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual Meeting Attendance Spreadsheet, Press Release, "What Size Cornell?" address, "From Now to 1960 - A Preview," photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "A Look Down the Future Years" address, photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Misc. articles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Map of Ithaca, press release, misc. articles,

did.unittitle: Cornell University Speakers Bureau - Negatives from G.P. Coleman
Cornell University Council - Membership Rosters - 1953-1968, Administrative Board Minutes - 1950-1966. Bound folders
